subject.title: Warrior S1-S3
subject.description: During the Tong Wars in the late 1800s, Ah Sahm, a martial arts prodigy from China, immigrates to San Francisco and becomes a hatchet man for the most powerful tong in Chinatown.
subject.postTitle: This show is just pure awesome.
